response:
I am a dedicated, organized, and leadership-oriented professional with 15+ years of experience in medical transcription, specializing in all medical specialties. I have strong knowledge of medical terminology and possess excellent interpersonal skills, making me an effective team player and excellent communicator. I am reliable, proactive, and always eager to learn and develop new skills. I have experience in supervising, transcribing, and managing customer relationships, with a proven track record of exceeding productivity and contributing to organizational success.  

I have worked as a medical scribe and editor, utilizing platforms such as eClinicalWorks, Experity EMR, and MS Office, with a focus on maintaining high accuracy and adherence to turnaround time. I have also held roles in quality assurance, customer service, and team leadership, demonstrating strong organizational and problem-solving abilities.  

I am proficient in Word, Excel, and email, with a typing speed of 70-80 words per minute. I am passionate about continuous learning and am committed to delivering exceptional service in the medical transcription field.  

I am an Indian national with an On Visit Visa and am eager to contribute to a professional and dynamic environment.
